content.text: {"component":"billing","summary":"Billing shows a clearly bounded billing domain with layered PHP code and domain migrations, but packaging, CI, and runner configs are missing, keeping it pre-RC despite strong internal docs and structure.","strengths":["Clear billing boundary and domain artifacts (invoices, ledger, idempotency)","Layered PHP structure (Http, Service, Infrastructure, ServiceInterface)","Architectural governance signal via deptrac.yaml","Documentation present for boundary and testing strategy","Presence of unit/e2e/Playwright test directories indicating verification intent"],"risks":["No composer.json found (packaging/autoload unknown)","No GitHub Actions workflows present","phpunit.xml and phpstan config not found","No release tags in git metadata","Playwright tests present without package.json"],"next_actions":["Add composer.json with PSR-4 autoload and dependencies","Introduce GitHub Actions to run unit/e2e/static checks on PRs","Add phpunit.xml and phpstan.neon; wire them in CI","Add package.json and Playwright config; document e2e run steps","Provide Dockerfile/docker-compose or runtime bootstrap instructions","Start semantic versioning and tag an initial release"],"notes":["All observations are grounded in the provided repository facts as of 2026-04-11 UTC.","Report excerpt mentions tooling that is not present in this repo; treat as aspirational until committed.","Symfony-style structure is inferred from config/services.yaml and Http directory; version is not asserted."],"confidence":"medium","evidence_paths":["config/services.yaml","deptrac.yaml","docs/billing-boundary.md","docs/testing-strategy.md","docs/documentation-guidelines.md","migrations/001_create_invoices.sql","migrations/002_create_ledger.sql","migrations/003_create_billing_idempotency.sql","phpdoc.xml.dist","src/Http","src/Infrastructure","src/Service","src/ServiceInterface","tests/unit","tests/e2e","tests/playwright"],"suggested_score_overrides":{"product":8.5,"architecture":8.4,"runtime":7.0,"qa":7.1,"ops":6.8,"market":8.3,"overall":7.7},"metric_updates":{"product":{"summary":"Product identity is clearly expressed via boundary documentation and domain-specific migrations, but lack of packaging and releases keeps it internal-facing.","risks":["No release tags reduce external consumption confidence","Absence of composer.json obscures packaging and dependency model"],"improvements":["Add composer.json and a concise README product overview","Begin semantic versioning and publish tagged releases"],"evidence":["docs/billing-boundary.md","migrations/001_create_invoices.sql","migrations/002_create_ledger.sql"]},"architecture":{"summary":"A governed architecture is evident through layered src (Http/Service/Infrastructure/ServiceInterface) and deptrac.yaml, though static-analysis enforcement is not yet wired.","risks":["No phpstan config to enforce architectural and type discipline","Missing composer autoload mapping for namespaces","No CI to run deptrac and prevent drift"],"improvements":["Add PSR-4 autoload in composer.json and align namespaces","Introduce phpstan.neon and enforce in CI","Run deptrac in CI and document layer rules in docs/architecture"],"evidence":["deptrac.yaml","src/Http","src/Service","src/Infrastructure","src/ServiceInterface"]},"runtime":{"summary":"Runtime surface is implied by Symfony-style service configuration and HTTP layer plus SQL migrations, but no containerization, bootstrap scripts, or packaging are present.","risks":["No Docker/Kubernetes or run scripts in-repo","No composer.json to install dependencies and bootstrap the app","No CI workflow to exercise migrations/runtime paths"],"improvements":["Add composer.json and documented bootstrap instructions","Provide Dockerfile/docker-compose for local/dev runs","Create CI job that installs deps and validates migrations"],"evidence":["config/services.yaml","migrations/003_create_billing_idempotency.sql","src/Http"]},"qa":{"summary":"Testing intent is documented and test directories exist (unit/e2e/Playwright), but runner and static-analysis configs are missing.","risks":["phpunit.xml not found to configure unit test runs","package.json missing for Playwright-based e2e","phpstan configuration absent and no CI workflows"],"improvements":["Add phpunit.xml (and coverage/baseline if needed) and run in CI","Add package.json and Playwright config with documented scripts","Introduce phpstan.neon and integrate into CI"],"evidence":["docs/testing-strategy.md","tests/unit","tests/e2e","tests/playwright"]},"ops":{"summary":"Operational and governance automation is thin in-repo; documentation exists but CI/CD, releases, and observability hooks are not committed.","risks":[".github/workflows is missing (no automated build/test pipeline)","No git release tags found","No observability/monitoring/tracing configuration in repo"],"improvements":["Create GitHub Actions workflows for build/test/lint/security scans","Adopt release tagging and changelog discipline","Document and add basic operational runbooks and probes where applicable"],"evidence":["docs/documentation-guidelines.md","deptrac.yaml"]},"market":{"summary":"Artifacts like invoices, ledger, and idempotency tables plus boundary docs align the component with billing/monetization scenarios, though public packaging is not yet available.","risks":["Lack of packaged releases limits adoption in the wider ecosystem","Public-facing docs remain internal markdown without a high-level brief"],"improvements":["Publish a concise capability overview and usage guide in README/docs","Add versioned migration notes aligned with releases"],"evidence":["docs/billing-boundary.md","migrations/001_create_invoices.sql","migrations/002_create_ledger.sql","migrations/003_create_billing_idempotency.sql"]},"overall":{"summary":"Strong domain and architectural signals are present, but missing packaging, CI, and release discipline keep Billing solidly pre-RC.","risks":["No composer.json or CI workflows committed","No release tags or standardized test/static configs"],"improvements":["Add packaging (composer.json), CI pipelines, and release tagging","Wire unit/e2e/static analysis and document run/deploy paths"],"evidence":["deptrac.yaml","docs/testing-strategy.md","config/services.yaml","migrations/001_create_invoices.sql"]}}}
